top3.sql:
SELECT 
    (pa_landon.overall_rating - pa_jordan.overall_rating) * 100.0 / pa_jordan.overall_rating AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    Player_Attributes pa_landon
JOIN 
    Player p_landon ON pa_landon.player_api_id = p_landon.player_api_id
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes pa_jordan ON pa_jordan.player_api_id = (
        SELECT player_api_id 
        FROM Player 
        WHERE player_name = 'Jordan Bowery'
    )
WHERE 
    p_landon.player_name = 'Landon Donovan'
    AND pa_landon.date = '2013-07-12'...
